evidence.snippet: ENGINeUS™ Aircraft Electric Motors are self-contained direct drive propulsion power pods. This modular and scalable machine allows an easy integration into a vehicle whilst maintaining optimization of the propulsive function of new mobility platforms and hybrid turbomachinery.
ENGINeUS, the first electric motor certified by EASA for new air mobility

items.notes: ENGINeUS™ electric motors are EASA-certified for new air mobility platforms including UAVs; marketed as direct-drive propulsion pods

evidence.snippet: Safran Electrical & Power is a developer of both primary generation systems and auxiliary generation systems. The company has also created GENeUS™, a family of smart generators that integrate active power management, making them the ideal power source for hybrid power systems
The new battery line GENeUSPACK™ and the associated management systems enable global optimization of systems on future platforms.
GENeUSGRID™ controls the aircraft’s electrical equipment, including electric propulsion, and intelligently manages energy sources, whether all-electric or hybrid.
Energy Storage Batteries for Electric Propulsion applications Up to 150kWh

items.notes: GENeUSPACK™ batteries (up to 150kWh), GENeUS™ smart generators (300 kW), and GENeUSGRID PROPULSION™ energy management — all targeting hybrid/electric propulsion

evidence.snippet:
Electrical Interconnection Systems (or wiring)
----------------------------------------------
As the world leader in electrical wiring interconnection systems, Safran Electrical & Power designs technical harnesses that carry power and/or data for all types of applications, including harsh environments. Working on a built-to-print or built-to-spec basis, the company manages varying design configurations and complexity thanks to the excellence of its industrial facilities.
The complete range of electrical components – backshells, transitions, sleeves and tubes, etc. – and specific accessories are designed to protect wiring, particularly in harsh environments.

items.notes: Electrical wiring interconnection systems (EWIS), harnesses, conduits, relays, contactors — broad portfolio of electrical interconnect components

evidence.snippet: ![marker](/themes/custom/safran_fo/public/images/icons/style-two-pin-marker-grey.svg) Meru, France

headquarters.notes: Safran Group is a French company; Safran Electrical & Power is a French-registered subsidiary with facilities in Chatou and Méru (Île-de-France). Specific HQ city for SEP not explicitly stated on site.

evidence.snippet: Safran Electrical & Power is one of the world's leaders in aircraft electrical systems. It is a key player in the equipment electrification & in the electric and hybrid propulsion sector. Mastering the on-board energy system, the company designs and provides modular, innovative and optimized architectures and solutions.
The electric motor ranges ENGINeUS™ integrate power electronics, and suit all types of onboard applications and, above all, the future electric propulsion for new platforms...

H55 selects Safran to supply the electric propulsion unit for the Bristell B23 Energic

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Supplies major electric propulsion subsystems (ENGINeUS™ motors, GENeUSPACK™ batteries, GENeUS™ generators, GENeUSGRID™ energy management) to aircraft and new air mobility OEMs; not an airframe OEM itself.

items.name: ENGINeUS™
items.product_type: aircraft electric motor for hybrid/electric propulsion

evidence.snippet: ENGINeUS™ Smart Electric Motors
ENGINeUS, the first electric motor certified by EASA for new air mobility

items.notes: EASA-certified for new air mobility; ranges include ENGINeUS™ 50-100 (50/100 kW) and ENGINeUS™ XL (500 kW – 1 MW)

items.name: GENeUSPACK™
items.product_type: smart battery system for electric propulsion

evidence.snippet: GENeUSPACK™
Energy Storage Batteries for Electric Propulsion applications Up to 150kWh

items.notes: Up to 150 kWh, 850 VDC; all-in-one smart battery for Electric Propulsion and More Electric Aircraft

items.name: GENeUS™
items.product_type: smart generator for hybrid power systems

evidence.snippet: GENeUS™ Smart Generator

First product in the GENeUS™ family of high speed Smart Motors/Generators. GENeUS™ has integrated active rectification to produce a controlled DC power and continuous electrical power generation capability of 300 kW. GENeUS™300 can also be used as a motor.

items.notes: 300 kW, 550–800 VDC; high-speed Smart Motor/Generator family for hybrid propulsion

items.name: GENeUSGRID PROPULSION™
items.product_type: energy management system for hybrid/electric propulsion

evidence.snippet: Energy Management System GENeUSGRID PROPULSION™

GENeUSGRID PROPULSION™ manages the energy system to meet the needs of hybrid electric or all-electric propulsion engines. It optimally and dynamically manages a combination of generators and high-voltage batteries while providing system integrity through the use of electrical protection.

items.notes: 100–1000 kW, 800–1000 VDC; manages combination of generators and high-voltage batteries for electric propulsion

readiness.notes: ENGINeUS™ is EASA-certified and in commercial use (H55 contract for Bristell B23 Energic). Products are catalog items with defined specs. Sarasota MRO facility expansion confirms operational scale.

unresolved_questions: Specific city/address of Safran Electrical & Power headquarters not explicitly stated on site (likely Chatou or Meru in Île-de-France region)
Whether any SEP products are specifically qualified for DoD/NDAA programs
tagline: Manufactures EASA-certified electric motors (ENGINeUS™, 50 kW–1 MW), smart battery systems (GENeUSPACK™, up to 150 kWh), and energy management systems for hybrid/all-electric aircraft propulsion. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. French parent company with production-ready subsystems; limited public evidence of US defense-sector integration or unmanned-systems–specific qualification.
